title: Red Sea / Houthi Shipping Disruption, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 4. Houthi anti-ship missiles have struck two commercial vessels in the Bab el-Mandeb. Operation Prosperity Guardian is escorting convoys. Iran has dispatched a frigate through the strait. The corridor carries 12% of global trade.
gdelt_query: Houthi OR "Bab el-Mandeb" OR "Red Sea" shipping OR "Prosperity Guardian" OR anti-ship missile
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Restore safe transit through Bab el-Mandeb without escalation.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: A commercial vessel is lost with a warship nearby.
